title: chrysanthemum seticuspe f. boreale
intro: Chrysanthemum seticuspe f. boreale, also known as Boreal Chrysanthemum, is a subspecies of flowering plant native to China, belonging to the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, headaches, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum seticuspe f. boreale include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu. Herbal preparations of Chrysanthemum seticuspe f. boreale include teas, infusions, and capsules, often used to boost the immune system and promote overall well-being.
